library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Marriage document. Two fragments of a Karaite ketubah of Ḥusn and David [?]. Early 11th century [?]. The smaller fragment, ENA NS 3. 27 was given the same shelf-mark as two fragments of a Rabbanite ketubah. It completes the text of the bigger fragment ENA NS 3. 23, and follows immediately in ll. 17-24. The surviving fragment is mostly a dowry list, worth over 490 dinars. (data from Olszowy-Schlanger, # 45) AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
